configuration.title: Configuration
configuration.subtitle: Manage system parameters and maintenance preferences

maintenanceThresholds.title: Maintenance Thresholds
maintenanceThresholds.subtitle: Configure the limits that trigger preventive maintenance alerts
maintenanceThresholds.descriptionCriticalHour: Automatically generates a ticket when a machine reaches this threshold
maintenanceThresholds.descriptionInactiveTime: Alert if a machine remains inactive during peak hours for this amount of time
maintenanceThresholds.descriptionPeakHourBuffer: Avoid scheduling maintenance within this range before/after peak hours
maintenanceThresholds.descriptionNote: The system automatically schedules maintenance while avoiding peak hours (6-9am, 6-9pm) and respecting the configured buffer

configurationIoT.title: IoT Configuration
configurationIoT.subtitle: Telemetry and Edge sensor parameters
configurationIoT.descriptionLowBattery: Alert when a sensor battery drops below this level
configurationIoT.descriptionGraceTime: Time before marking a sensor as disconnected

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.subtitle: Configure alerts and recipients
notifications.descriptionEmailNotification: Primary address for receiving system alerts

financialConfiguration.title: Financial Configuration
financialConfiguration.subtitle: Parameters for ROI and financial impact calculations
financialConfiguration.descriptionAverageCostHourDowntime: Estimated loss per hour of machine downtime
financialConfiguration.descriptionAverageMonthlyMembership: Used for ROI calculation in projections
